required_preferences.fact: Listens to legal-themed audiobooks during commutes and downtime—rarely finishes physical novels due to schedule overload

required_preferences.fact: Preps iron-rich vegetarian lunches for weekdays, including eggs, legumes, and leafy greens—occasionally supplements with iron-fortified snacks to meet medical requirements

required_preferences.fact: Co-plans weeknight home meals with her sister, usually preparing or eating together instead of eating solo or on the run

persona: A law student specializing in intellectual property law
